title: Wano’s Long Night Begins to Break
description: On pages 9–11, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Kaido, Unknown person #9 as Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.
scene: Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Look at Roger, he had no fruit power...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...and still brought the world to heel!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: such hurdles can only be overcome...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Seems you're still weak to slashing attacks!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 13 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
